summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 1 audit of PDF Export system in Garment ERP v8.0. Tested all 16 PDF export types, PDF Config CRUD operations, column filtering, default preset behavior, and confirmed critical company settings bug. Backend APIs working well (94.6% success rate), but found PDF Config Module UI accessibility issues and confirmed expected gaps.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 - vendor-inspection PDF type not implemented
critical_bugs.impact: One of 17 PDF types not working

validation_issues.issue: Accepts unknown pdf_type without validation - returns 201 instead of 400

confirmed_bugs.issue: pdf_header_line1, pdf_header_line2, pdf_footer_text fields are saved in DB but NOT rendered in output PDFs
confirmed_bugs.impact: CRITICAL - Company branding not appearing in PDFs
confirmed_bugs.evidence: PDF text extraction confirmed no header/footer text in generated PDFs

ui_bugs.issue: Module not accessible via sidebar navigation - 'Konfigurasi PDF' link not working consistently
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot access PDF configuration features

ui_bugs.issue: Export button downloads Excel (.xlsx) instead of PDF
ui_bugs.impact: Operational PDF export not working as expected

expected_gaps.missing_types: 4 PDF types intentionally missing from UI: vendor-inspection, buyer-shipment, production-return, material-request

accessibility_issues.issue: Session management issues causing frequent logouts during testing

passed_tests: 16 out of 17 PDF export types working (vendor-inspection failed)
PDF Config CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Column filtering functionality working (252 byte size difference confirmed)
Company Settings module accessible and PDF fields present
PDF text extraction and bug confirmation

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (partial - PDF Config Module accessibility issues, operational export format issue)

critical_fixes: Fix Company Settings PDF header/footer rendering in PDFs - CRITICAL BUG confirmed
Fix PDF Config Module UI accessibility - 'Konfigurasi PDF' navigation not working
Fix Production PO export to generate PDF instead of Excel
medium_priority: Add validation for unknown pdf_type in config creation
Improve session management for better UI stability
audit_findings: 4 PDF types missing from UI is EXPECTED (vendor-inspection, buyer-shipment, production-return, material-request)
Column filtering and default preset behavior working correctly
Backend PDF generation APIs working well overall
